title: The Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy
text: A comedic science fiction novel following Arthur Dent's misadventures through space after Earth's demolition. Features absurdist humor, the number 42, and an electronic guidebook.

title: Dune
text: An epic science fiction saga set on the desert planet Arrakis. Follows Paul Atreides as he navigates political intrigue, giant sandworms, and the spice melange that controls interstellar travel.

title: Blade Runner
text: A neo-noir science fiction film set in a dystopian future Los Angeles. A blade runner must pursue and terminate four replicants who have escaped to Earth seeking longer lifespans.
